# Zigpoll

## Zigpoll

- [What is Zigpoll](https://docs.zigpoll.com/readme.md): Zigpoll is a survey widget that can be embedded on any website. You can use Zigpoll to easily gather feedback from your customers throughout the customer journey.
- [Installation](https://docs.zigpoll.com/installation.md): How to install Zigpoll and start surveying your customers
- [Activating Zigpoll on Shopify 2.0](https://docs.zigpoll.com/installation/activating-zigpoll-on-shopify-2.0.md)
- [Activating Zigpoll on Shopify Checkout Extensions](https://docs.zigpoll.com/installation/activating-zigpoll-on-shopify-checkout-extensions.md)
- [Accounts](https://docs.zigpoll.com/accounts.md): Not sure you understand how accounts work? Don't worry, you're in the right place. Everything you need to know can be found here.
- [General Settings](https://docs.zigpoll.com/accounts/general-settings.md): Learn about all the general settings here
- [Display Defaults](https://docs.zigpoll.com/accounts/display-settings.md): Learn how to make your survey as beautiful as your website.
- [Embed Code](https://docs.zigpoll.com/accounts/embed-code.md): Copy and paste to get the party started.
- [Surveys](https://docs.zigpoll.com/accounts/active-polls.md): View and reorder your active surveys.
- [Join Existing Account](https://docs.zigpoll.com/accounts/join-existing-account.md)
- [Surveys](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls.md): Not sure you understand surveys? Don't worry, you're in the right place.
- [General Settings](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/display-rules.md): A quick overview of survey settings
- [Design and styling](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/display-settings.md): Learn how to take control of your survey appearance
- [Custom Fonts](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/display-settings/custom-fonts.md)
- [Delivery Settings](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/visibility-settings.md): Zigpoll gives you control over when surveys are displayed and how it should act once completed
- [Nudge Non-Responders](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/nudge-non-responders.md): Automatically send a one-time reminder to people who were sent or presented a survey but didn't respond
- [Behavior Settings](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/behavior-settings.md): Control how your survey behaves when displayed to participants
- [Targeting Settings](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/targeting-settings.md): Control who sees your surveys
- [Language and Translations](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/langauge-settings.md): Show your survey in the language of your respondent
- [Management Options](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/management-options.md): Learn how to manage your legacy surveys and keep your account clean.
- [Slides](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/slide-settings.md): View and reorder your slides.
- [Survey Preview](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/poll-preview.md): See your Zigpoll survey in action before taking it live
- [Importing data](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/importing-data.md)
- [Top 4 Surveys to Start With](https://docs.zigpoll.com/polls/top-4-surveys-to-start-with.md): Make the most of the platform by starting with these surveys
- [Slides](https://docs.zigpoll.com/slides.md): Not sure you understand slides? Don't worry, you're in the right place. Everything you need to know can be found here.
- [Types of Slides](https://docs.zigpoll.com/slides/types-of-slides.md): Learn about all the different types of slides at your disposal.
- [Slide Logic](https://docs.zigpoll.com/slides/slide-logic.md): Perform logic jumps or other actions using slide logic.
- [Template Variables](https://docs.zigpoll.com/slides/template-variables.md): Make your slides dynamic using template variables
- [Answer Importing](https://docs.zigpoll.com/slides/answer-importing.md)
- [Analytics, AI, and Reporting](https://docs.zigpoll.com/analytics-ai-and-reporting.md): How to review and analyze your data using Zigpoll's built-in reporting features
- [Synthetic Research](https://docs.zigpoll.com/synthetic-research.md): Generate AI-powered survey responses from configurable audience profiles
- [Running Your First Research](https://docs.zigpoll.com/synthetic-research/running-your-first-research.md): Step-by-step guide to generating your first synthetic research responses
- [Audience Profiles Reference](https://docs.zigpoll.com/synthetic-research/audience-profiles-reference.md): Complete reference for audience profile templates, demographic attributes, and configuration options
- [Embed](https://docs.zigpoll.com/embed.md): Have questions about how to embed your Zigpoll? Look no further.
- [Participant Metadata](https://docs.zigpoll.com/embed/participant-metadata.md): Get the most out of your implementation by tracking participant metadata.
- [Survey Metadata](https://docs.zigpoll.com/embed/poll-metadata.md): Get the most out of your implementation by tracking metadata.
- [Special Variables](https://docs.zigpoll.com/embed/poll-metadata/special-variables.md): Some metadata has special meaning with the Zigpoll dashboard.
- [Template Variables](https://docs.zigpoll.com/embed/template-variables.md): Customize your slides by adding dynamic template variables!
- [Participants](https://docs.zigpoll.com/participants.md): Dig deeper into individual participant data and view response history
- [Subscription Plans](https://docs.zigpoll.com/subscription-plans.md): We offer a variety of plans that should fit any sized business
- [How we calculate responses](https://docs.zigpoll.com/subscription-plans/how-we-calculate-requests.md): Wondering how your responses add up?
- [Billing](https://docs.zigpoll.com/billing.md): Questions about billing? Look no further.
- [Notifications](https://docs.zigpoll.com/notifications.md): Learn how to control your Zigpoll email notifications.
- [Shopify App](https://docs.zigpoll.com/shopify-app.md): Seamlessly integrate Zigpoll into your Shopify Store
- [Log In](https://docs.zigpoll.com/shopify-app/log-in.md): How to log in to Zigpoll through Shopify
- [Shopify Flow](https://docs.zigpoll.com/shopify-app/shopify-flow.md): Utilize our Shopify Flow Integration
- [Web Pixel Events](https://docs.zigpoll.com/shopify-app/shopify-web-pixel-events.md): Subscribe to Zigpoll lifecycle and answer events from a Shopify Custom Pixel
- [Affiliate Program](https://docs.zigpoll.com/affiliate-program.md): Earn 50% revenue share on every referral with the Zigpoll Affiliate Program.
- [Public Link](https://docs.zigpoll.com/public-link.md): Learn about how to best utilize your Survey's public link.
- [Survey Links](https://docs.zigpoll.com/survey-links.md): Generate unique, trackable survey links with metadata and optional expiration dates.
- [Javascript API](https://docs.zigpoll.com/javascript-api.md): Want to create some custom behavior for your Zigpoll?
- [Web API](https://docs.zigpoll.com/web-api.md): Interact with your survey data using our api service
- [Integrations](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations.md): Connect your favorite apps with Zigpoll
- [Klaviyo](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/klaviyo.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Klaviyo
- [Brevo](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/brevo.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Brevo
- [Attentive](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/attentive.md): Send survey responses and SMS/email subscribers into Attentive
- [Braze](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/braze.md): Send survey responses and customer profiles into Braze
- [Mailchimp](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/mailchimp.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Mailchimp
- [GetResponse](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/getresponse.md)
- [Omnisend](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/omnisend.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Omnisend
- [Gorgias](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/gorgias.md): How to get started with Gorgias
- [ActiveCampaign](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/activecampaign.md)
- [Slack](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/slack.md): How to get started with slack
- [Google Analytics](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/google-analytics.md)
- [Shopify](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/shopify.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Shopify
- [Google Sheets](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/google-sheets.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Google Sheets
- [Data Studio](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/data-studio.md): Build live dashboards on your Zigpoll surveys, slides, and responses using the Zigpoll Community Connector for Data Studio.
- [n8n](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/n8n.md): All you need to know about our n8n integration
- [API Key](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/api-key.md): Learn how to get your API key which you can use to connect Zigpoll to any workflow
- [MCP (AI Assistants)](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/mcp.md): Connect Zigpoll to AI assistants like Claude using the Model Context Protocol (MCP)
- [Webhooks](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/webhooks.md)
- [Google Tag Manager](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/google-tag-manager.md)
- [Wix](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/wix.md)
- [Squarespace](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/squarespace.md)
- [Framer](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/framer.md)

- [Wordpress](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/wordpress.md)
- [Linktree](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/linktree.md): 📢 How to Create a Public Zigpoll Survey and Share It on Linktree
- [Webflow](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/webflow.md)
- [Weebly](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/weebly.md)
- [Bigcommerce](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/bigcommerce.md)
- [Centra](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/centra.md)
- [Adobe Commerce](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/adobe-commerce.md)

- [RudderStack](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/rudderstack.md): Send survey responses and customer profiles into RudderStack
- [Customer.io](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/customerio.md): Send survey responses and customer profiles into Customer.io
- [Iterable](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/iterable.md): Send survey responses and customer profiles into Iterable
- [Permutive](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/permutive.md): Send survey responses into Permutive for audience segmentation
- [Heap](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/heap.md)
- [Amplitude](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/amplitude.md)
- [Mixpanel](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/mixpanel.md)
- [Klar](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/klar.md): Stream Zigpoll survey responses into Klar in real time using the Google Sheets bridge.
- [Prestashop](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/prestashop.md): Learn how to connect Zigpoll to your Prestashop store
- [Opensend](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/opensend.md): Automatically sync opensend data back into your survey results
- [Flashy](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/flashy.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Flashy
- [Triple Whale](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/triple-whale.md): Get the most out of Zigpoll and Triple Whale
- [ClickUp](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/clickup.md): How to get started with ClickUp
- [Jira](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/jira.md): How to get started with Jira
- [HubSpot](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/hubspot.md): How to get started with HubSpot
- [Zendesk](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/zendesk.md): How to get started with Zendesk
- [Drip](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/drip.md): How to get started with Drip
- [Marketo](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/marketo.md): Connect Adobe Marketo to create and update leads from survey responses.
- [Notion](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/notion.md): How to get started with Notion
- [Stripe](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/stripe.md): Trigger surveys from Stripe payment events
- [Square](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/square.md): Trigger surveys from Square payment events
- [Make](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/make.md): Automate survey workflows with Make (formerly Integromat)
- [Zapier](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/zapier.md): Connect Zigpoll with 6,000+ apps using Zapier
- [Shopify Email](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/shopify-email.md): Include Zigpoll survey links in your Shopify Email templates
- [Aftership](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/aftership.md): Include Zigpoll survey links in your Aftership email templates
- [MedusaJS](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/medusajs.md)
- [Weglot](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/weglot.md): Translate your Zigpoll surveys with Weglot
- [GA4 Shopify Pixel](https://docs.zigpoll.com/integrations/ga4-shopify-pixel.md): Connect GA4 with your Shopify Checkout Extension to track Zigpoll events
- [Tutorials](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials.md)
- [Creating Surveys with AI](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/creating-surveys-with-ai.md): Use Zigpoll's AI to generate complete surveys from a simple prompt
- [Adding Team Members](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/adding-team-members.md): Learn how to add team members to your account.
- [Adding discount codes to your survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/adding-discount-codes-to-your-survey.md): Zigpoll comes with support for Shopify discount codes
- [Launching an NPS Survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/launching-an-nps-survey.md): Zigpoll supports NPS surveys
- [Customer Effort Score (CES)](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/customer-effort-score.md): Measure how easy it is for customers to interact with your product or service
- [Attribution Surveys](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/attribution-surveys.md): Measure which marketing channels are driving your customers
- [Exit Intent Survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/exit-intent-survey.md): Create a survey that appears when visitors are about to leave your site
- [Abandoned Cart Survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/abandoned-cart-survey.md): Automatically email customers who abandon their cart
- [Fulfillment Survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/fulfillment-survey.md): Automatically email surveys when an order is marked as fulfilled
- [Order Paid Survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/order-paid-survey.md): Automatically email surveys when an order is marked as paid
- [Order Delivery Survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/order-delivery-survey.md): Automatically email surveys when an order is delivered
- [Layered Post Purchase Surveys](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/layered-post-purchase-surveys.md): Deliver different surveys on the same page based on customer context
- [Shopify Order Contact Form](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/shopify-order-contact-form.md): Add a contact form to your Shopify order status pages
- [SMS Surveys](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/sms-surveys.md): Send surveys to your customers via SMS
- [Email Survey Design](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/email-survey-design.md): Customize the design and branding of your email surveys
- [Email Shopify Customer Segment](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/email-shopify-customer-segment.md): Send survey emails to a segment of your Shopify customers
- [CSV Formatting](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/csv-formatting.md): Format your CSV file correctly for Zigpoll email campaigns
- [Email CSV Formatting](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/email-csv-formatting.md): Format your CSV file correctly for Zigpoll email campaigns
- [SMS CSV Formatting](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/sms-csv-formatting.md): Format your CSV file correctly for Zigpoll SMS campaigns
- [Reward Slide](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/reward-slide.md): Incentivize customers to complete your survey with a reward slide
- [Shopify Dynamic Discount Codes](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/shopify-dynamic-discount-codes.md): Offer static or dynamic Shopify discount codes through your survey
- [Custom Launcher Image](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/custom-launcher-image.md): Upload your own launcher image to fully match your brand
- [Custom Header Image](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/custom-header-image.md): Add a custom header image to your survey
- [Adding Images to Slides](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/adding-images-to-slides.md): Add images to individual survey slides
- [Shapes and Placements](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/shapes-and-placements.md): Choose from different launcher shapes and screen positions
- [Hide the Launcher](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/hide-the-launcher.md): Hide the launcher button so the survey appears without a persistent icon
- [A/B Testing Surveys](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/a-b-testing-surveys.md): Use percentage targeting to A/B test different surveys on the same page
- [Advanced Shopify Targeting](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/advanced-shopify-targeting.md): Target specific Shopify customers based on order count, spend, and tags
- [Exit Intent Conditions](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/exit-intent-conditions.md): Configure exit intent to show only when specific conditions are met
- [Exit Intent on Mobile](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/exit-intent-mobile.md): How Zigpoll detects exit intent on mobile devices
- [Exporting Data to CSV](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/exporting-data-to-csv.md): Export your survey response data to a CSV file
- [Automations](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/automations.md): Automate routine tasks like report exports on a schedule
- [Post Purchase Order Stats](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/order-stats.md): View order value data alongside your post purchase survey responses
- [Deleting Survey Responses](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/deleting-responses.md): Remove test data or unwanted survey responses
- [Removing Participant Data](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/removing-participant-data.md): Remove participant data for privacy compliance or data cleanup
- [Deleting a Survey](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/deleting-a-survey.md): Permanently delete a survey from your account
- [Editing Survey Questions](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/editing-survey-questions.md): Edit existing survey questions and reorder slides
- [Custom Survey Trigger](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/custom-trigger.md): Trigger a Zigpoll survey with custom JavaScript events
- [Klaviyo Discount Reminder](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/klaviyo-discount-reminder.md): Automatically send a follow-up discount reminder email using Klaviyo
- [Klaviyo URL Templates](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/klaviyo-url-templates.md): Pass Shopify customer and order data through Klaviyo URLs
- [Klaviyo Segmentation](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/klaviyo-segmentation.md): Create Klaviyo segments based on Zigpoll survey completions
- [Legacy Post Purchase Installation](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/legacy-post-purchase-installation.md): Install Zigpoll on legacy Shopify post purchase pages using additional scripts
- [Ideas for Using Zigpoll MCP](https://docs.zigpoll.com/tutorials/zigpoll-mcp-use-cases.md): Practical use cases for connecting Zigpoll's MCP server to automated workflows, reporting, and customer intelligence
- [Email Zigpoll Surveys](https://docs.zigpoll.com/email-zigpoll-surveys.md)
- [FAQ](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq.md): Answers to the most common questions we receive from Zigpoll users
- [Why Is My Survey Not Showing?](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/why-is-my-survey-not-showing.md): Common reasons your Zigpoll survey may not be appearing and how to fix them
- [Survey Visibility and Display Issues](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/survey-visibility-and-display-issues.md): Troubleshoot common issues with surveys not displaying correctly
- [Integrations and External Tools](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/integrations-and-external-tools.md): Common questions about connecting Zigpoll with other tools and platforms
- [Customization, Localization, and Targeting](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/customization-localization-and-targeting.md): Common questions about survey customization, translations, and audience targeting
- [Data, Reporting, and Exports](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/data-reporting-and-exports.md): Common questions about survey data, reporting, and exporting responses
- [Billing, Accounts, and Plans](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/billing-accounts-and-plans.md): Common questions about billing, account management, and subscription plans
- [Discount Codes and Reward Automation](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/discount-codes-and-reward-automation.md): How to set up and manage discount codes and rewards for survey respondents
- [Email Notification Management](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/email-notification-management.md): How to control and customize your Zigpoll email notifications
- [Custom Domains and SSL](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/custom-domains-and-ssl.md): How to set up a custom domain for your Zigpoll surveys
- [Branding and White-Labeling](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/branding-and-white-labeling.md): How to customize or remove Zigpoll branding from your surveys
- [Survey Logic and Conditional Flows](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/survey-logic-and-conditional-flows.md): How to use skip logic, branching, and conditional flows in your surveys
- [Email Survey Distribution](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/email-survey-distribution.md): How to send Zigpoll surveys via email to your customers
- [Embedding Surveys on Specific Pages](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/embedding-surveys-on-specific-pages.md): How to embed Zigpoll surveys on specific pages of your website
- [Security, Privacy, and Compliance](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/security-privacy-and-compliance.md): Information about data privacy, GDPR compliance, and security practices
- [Survey Performance and Loading Speed](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/survey-performance-and-loading-speed.md): Troubleshoot slow survey loading and optimize survey performance
- [Multi-Store Management](https://docs.zigpoll.com/faq/multi-store-management.md): How to manage Zigpoll across multiple Shopify stores or websites
- [Playbooks for Agencies](https://docs.zigpoll.com/playbooks-for-agencies.md)
- [Building Automated Reporting with Zigpoll](https://docs.zigpoll.com/playbooks-for-agencies/building-automated-reporting-with-zigpoll.md): Use survey data as the foundation for automated reporting for clients

---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.zigpoll.com/readme.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
